case_title: WINNIE YUEN SHAN LEUNG VS. JASON BOOTH

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-23-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2008 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-23-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BOOTH, JASON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LEUNG, WINNIE YUEN SHAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO DEFT.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $952.58 FILED BY BOOTH, JASON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LEUNG, WINNIE YUEN SHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-23-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEUNG, WINNIE YUEN SHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOOTH, JASON $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,585.00, THE PARTIES WAIVE ANY DEFECTS IN SERVICE OF THEIR RESPECTIVE CLAIMS. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY OF $6,600 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE AND $2,000 FOR BODILY INJURIES; THE JUDGMENT IS REDUCED TO THE COURT'S STATUTORY LIMIT OF $7,500. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2008 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LEUNG, WINNIE YUEN SHAN AS TO DEFENDANT BOOTH, JASON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, WINNIE YUEN SHAN AS TO DEFENDANT BOOTH, JASON
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED APR-16-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LEUNG, WINNIE YUEN SHAN
